name: A Very Intriguing Offer
description:
two business women fighting over your decision, standing in front of you, giving you their “specialized” business card..which will you choose?

A very interesting offer indeed..

Gotta love me a woman in a suit! Especially one with such high professionalism 👀

Anyways I hope you guys enjoy, sorry for not posting in a while, I’m not gonna lie I’ve been procrastinating since it takes me an hour or to two to make a bot, so I hope you guys like this one!

my eyes are definitely set on white fox next from marvel rivals..(did you know she’s voiced by Caesar king?)

Anyways I love you all and I’ll see you on the next bot! Bye bye 💙🧡
creator: Capt
